title: masdevallia × stella
intro: Masdevallia × stella is a hybrid orchid plant known for its unique and delicate appearance. It is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits associated with Masdevallia × stella include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the roots or leaves in water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
